destination.name: Bangkok
destination.funFact: Bangkok is the capital and most populous city of Thailand.

destination.name: Paris
destination.funFact: The Eiffel Tower can be up to 15 cm taller during hot days.

destination.name: Tokyo
destination.funFact: Tokyo has more Michelin-starred restaurants than any other city.

destination.name: New York
destination.funFact: The Statue of Liberty was a gift from France in 1886.

destination.name: Sydney
destination.funFact: The Sydney Opera House roof is made of over one million tiles.

destination.name: Rome
destination.funFact: Rome is home to the smallest country in the world, Vatican City.

destination.name: Cancun
destination.funFact: Cancun is known for having part of the world's second-largest coral reef.
